title: GateSpec V1
description: Generic gate authority contract shared across approval, quality, and convergence checkpoints.

gate_id.description: Stable gate identifier, e.g. A1 or team_convergence.

gate_type.description: Generic gate taxonomy. Approval checkpoints are one gate type, not the whole abstraction.

scope.description: Human-readable authority boundary or workflow scope for the gate.

fail_behavior.description: Enforcement posture when the gate cannot be evaluated.

audit_required.description: Whether the gate must emit auditable provenance when enforced.
